title: Implement /deaddrop and /confessions CoAP resources with OSCORE, SenML, encrypted S&F in coap_dtn.c
description: Create or update coap_dtn.c with resources for deaddrop (POST encrypted msgs), confessions (anonymous). Use per-spec oscore_ctx, DTN integration from routing/dtn.c, rate limiting, Kconfig. Follow 12-apps.md and 11-lci.md. 3 codereview passes mandatory.
close_reason: 3 codereview passes complete; all findings fixed; Zephyr/CoAP tests passed (pytest + native_sim build); coap_dtn.c now implements full /deaddrop and /confessions with OSCORE/SenML/DTN/rate-limit per spec 12-apps.md and 11-lci.md. Mimicked style, zero comments added.
